support_note: SimPy teaching variant supports the capacity sizing scenario with a fixed arrival rate and constant resource counts. Small enough to run interactively.
SIMIO production variant supports capacity sizing with realistic time-varying arrivals, making its capacity-sizing results closer to what a consulting engagement would produce.
SIMIO production variant is the canonical form of the workforce scheduling scenario — it explicitly models shift schedules and tests both proportional and optimization-driven allocation strategies.
SIMIO production variant tests both reactive and proactive staffing strategies directly (per the Ruiz et al. paper, context row 1).
SIMIO production variant supports PreCheck lane allocation via its passenger-class modeling (regular vs. PreCheck) even though the specific scenario is not a headline experiment in the source paper.
